arts.ttl: Sky: Roma close to Rensch agreement with Ajax
arts.sum: Sky Sport Italia reports Roma are close to reaching an agreement with Ajax for Devyne...

arts.ttl: Roma Set to Hold Crunch Talks with Superstar Forward Over New Deal
arts.sum: Roma sporting director Florent Ghisolfi will soon hold a crunch meeting with Paulo Dybala's entourage, Carlos Novel, to discuss a contract extension. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the parties will reconvene at the end of the January transfer window to determine La Joya's fate. The post Roma Set to Hold Crunch Talks with Superstar Forward Over New Deal appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Roma Intensify Negotiations for Ajax Defender Rensch
arts.sum: Roma are making significant progress in its pursuit of Devyne Rensch, the young defender from Ajax. Recent reports from Gianluca Di Marzio indicate that the gap between Roma's offer and Ajax's asking price has narrowed considerably, with only €2 million separating the two clubs. The post Roma Intensify Negotiations for Ajax Defender Rensch appeared first on FootItalia.com.
